description_long: This is a modern, rectangular house surrounded by a manicured garden with tall, evenly spaced cypress trees and lush shrubbery. The house features a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of light blue and stone-textured exterior walls. The front includes a driveway leading to a garage, a fenced yard, and a formal entryway with a path flanked by decorative plants. The backyard area is more private, with a patio, outdoor seating, and a swimming pool partially shaded by trees. The house appears to have spacious, open-plan interiors with multiple rooms visible through the windows, and the landscaping is symmetrical and well-maintained.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, stone and blue exterior, surrounded by cypress trees and landscaped gardens.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, symmetrical garden, and tall cypress trees lining the property.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, window arrangement, and the continuation of the tree-lined fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, swimming pool, patio area, and dense tree coverage for privacy.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage side, additional garden space, and the transition between front and back yards.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small steps, a paved path, and flanked by decorative landscaping and cypress trees.
